title: trifolium subterraneum var. oxaloides
intro: Trifolium subterraneum var. oxaloides, also known as perennial subterranean clover, is a variety of the subterranean clover species, characterized by its perennial habit and ability to survive harsh conditions. It possesses medicinal properties due to its high content of isoflavones and other bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Trifolium subterraneum var. oxaloides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
